candidates.why: Candidate exists, but appears to be from lease/debt maturity schedule and is not a reliable clean short-term debt measure here.
Clean current borrowing component and excludes leases; preferable because the broader current borrowings total appears to include lease liabilities.
Semantically relevant for short-term debt, but no evidence it is the primary reported row here.
Too generic and may not be current-only.
Would otherwise be a strong match, but it appears to include lease liabilities in some years, which baseline STD should exclude.

variables.notes: Manual review because the apparent total current debt line, 'Interest-bearing loans and borrowings (current)', seems to include lease liabilities in some years. Chose the cleaner non-lease component 'Current loans from financial institutions', but coverage across years may be incomplete.

candidates.why: Best semantic match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but 'Current Tax' is a confident semantic match to current tax payable/current tax liability.
